query: muddy low contrast gray oppressive heavy fog smog suffocating bleak atmosphere
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: low-contrast oppressive — fog, smog, monotone gray, weak tonal separation, suffocating bleakness

response.objective_caption: A wooden pier extends into thick fog, with a row of weathered wooden benches lined up along the right side. The benches feature carved inscriptions on their backrests. Metal railings run along both sides of the walkway. The far end of the pier is obscured by fog. The surface appears damp, and no people are visible.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A wooden pier stretches into thick fog, lined with weathered memorial benches bearing carved inscriptions. The image is dominated by muted, faded gray tones with almost no color vibrancy. Flat lighting from the fog eliminates shadows and collapses depth into a two-dimensional surface, while oppressively low contrast creates weak separation between light and dark across the entire frame. The heavy, suffocating atmosphere evokes melancholy, isolation, and unease as the pier fades into an obscured void.
